title: Punches High Fives
wikitext:
[]: Punches/High Fives             Quote Post by schismatics » Thu May 21, 2009 8:06 pm Ok if you could punch one character in the face and give a high five to another character, who would they be? High-five - Toji - because he's the only somewhat normal Eva pilot Punch in the face - Maya - only because no one else would..

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Thu May 21, 2009 8:07 pm What if I choose to offer respect knuckles and a slaps instead?

[]:             Quote Post by IrkenEvangelion » Thu May 21, 2009 8:08 pm I think this is another pointless thread but of course I will partake. I would high-five Asuka and Aoba and I would punch... I don't know, Kaji or or the guy in EoE who told the guy with the flamethrower to "Hit 'em again".

[]: Re: Punches/High Fives             Quote Post by Rock-Slash » Thu May 21, 2009 8:21 pm schismatics wrote: Punch in the face - Maya - only because no one else would..

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Thu May 21, 2009 9:18 pm I'd punch Asuka whenever she takes her "I'M THE BEST PILOT EVER!" moments to far. I'd high five Shinji for doing a Wayne Brady in EoE. Wayne Brady wrote: Is Wayne Brady gonna have to choke a bitch?

[]:             Quote Post by IrkenEvangelion » Thu May 21, 2009 9:56 pm A cookie to anyone besides ThePRPD who knows what show that was from.

[]:             Quote Post by Fast Tony DeNiro » Thu May 21, 2009 10:21 pm Dave Chapelle man....it was like the best skit ever done on that show. IrkenEvangelion wrote: I would punch... I don't know, Kaji or or the guy in EoE who told the guy with the flamethrower to "Hit 'em again"

[]:             Quote Post by IrkenEvangelion » Thu May 21, 2009 10:32 pm +1 cookie. Yes that was one of the best skits.

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Thu May 21, 2009 10:34 pm @Deniro That reminds me. I'd punch Gendo for causing third impact and Shinji for not getting into Unit-01 sooner. He could have saved Asuka AND probably killed the rest of the MP Evas.

[]:             Quote Post by schismatics » Thu May 21, 2009 10:42 pm Joseph the PRPD wrote: ^ That reminds me. I'd punch Gendo for causing third impact and Shinji for not getting into Unit-01 sooner. He could have saved Asuka AND probably killed the rest of the MP Evas.

[]:             Quote Post by Gamer_2k4 » Fri May 22, 2009 12:04 am I'd punch Shinji because he sure seems like he needs it (think Simon in Gurren Lagann episode 8). I'd high five Pen^2 because he's the most likable character.

[]:             Quote Post by PuppetChaos » Fri May 22, 2009 1:24 am I second Gamer_2k4's assertion. I would give Shinji a MANLY MAN PUNCH OF MAN-NESS TO MAKE HIM MAN UP. Then I'd die in Episode 8 and Shinji would go on to killing things in a galaxy-sized Eva. I'd high-five PenPen too... And I'd high-five Gendo. With a backhoe.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Fri May 22, 2009 1:39 am http://www.evacommentary.org/episode-03/episode-03A-scene4.html#cut106

[]:             Quote Post by Timstuff » Fri May 22, 2009 2:18 am I'd high-five Asuka because she's awesome, and I'd high five Makoto because I think he's totally going to score with Misato after EoE. I'd punch Gendo because he's a bastard, and manga Kaji because he pretty much traumatized Shinji to get him to fight Zeuriel.

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Fri May 22, 2009 6:32 am Timstuff wrote: he's totally going to score with Misato after EoE.

[]:             Quote Post by Gamer_2k4 » Fri May 22, 2009 7:30 am Mr. Tines wrote: http://www.evacommentary.org/episode-03/episode-03A-scene4.html#cut106

[]:             Quote Post by TheLobe » Fri May 22, 2009 8:31 am the entire cast, on both counts.

[]:             Quote Post by Zaiku » Fri May 22, 2009 9:01 am ^I wholeheartedly agree. But if I MUST single it down... I'd High-Five Ramiel, cause it'd be hilarious trying to high five a big octohedron, and I'd punch... no, FALCON PAWNCH!!! Keel, just because he is such a fuckin' douchebag and I hate him. '_'

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Fri May 22, 2009 12:11 pm I'd also punch Kaworu. Why? Jut cuz...

[]:             Quote Post by schismatics » Fri May 22, 2009 12:39 pm Kids who appear to be gay and have an interest in Shinji have it coming.
